title: HEROCLIP Carabiner Clip Hook Large for Camping, Backpack, Organization (Blue)
description:
Heroclip Large gear clip lets you hook and hang big backpacks from trees, duffle bags from fences, buckets from ladders, and carry-ons from bathroom stalls. This versatile gear clip hangs securely, rotates 360 degrees, and folds compactly in ways other carabiners, clips and hooks can’t, helping you keep your gear organized and exactly where you want it, no matter the activity. The clip also features a wider clip gate compared to standard carabiners and hooks, and a hook with a grippy rubber tip for hanging things from flat surfaces. PLEASE NOTE: This product is not designed for climbing.

HEROCLIP Carabiner Clip Hook Large for Camping, Backpack, Organization (Blue)

Heroclip Large gear clip lets you hook and hang big backpacks from trees, duffle bags from fences, buckets from ladders, and carry-ons from bathroom stalls. This versatile gear clip hangs securely, rotates 360 degrees, and folds compactly in ways other carabiners, clips and hooks can’t, helping you keep your gear organized and exactly where you want it, no matter the activity.

Key Features

  • HEROCLIP is the world's first 3-in-1 clip and hook that can hang just about anything, just about anywhere!
  • HANG STUFF SECURELY: Heroclip Large can hold up to 100 lbs and the rubber tip creates optimal grip so your stuff stays secure. 40% Larger than Medium.
  • COMPACT DESIGN: Hook and clip nest together when not in use. SIZE LARGE 4.1" wide, 5.24" high (closed)/7.25" (expanded).
  • COUNTLESS USES: Our Large Heroclip is ideal for bulky outdoor gear, garage organization, shopping carts, strollers and much more.
  • BUILT TO LAST: Durable Aircraft-grade aluminum. WARNING: Not for climbing or other use where disconnection may result in bodily harm or property damage.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 210014-401
  • UPC: 852054008385
  • Color: Blue Steel
  • Size: L

The clip also features a wider clip gate compared to standard carabiners and hooks, and a hook with a grippy rubber tip for hanging things from flat surfaces.

PLEASE NOTE: This product is not designed for climbing.
